chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1810 of 2024 Khursheed Ahmed Khan Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 08.08.2024 None present for the petitioner. -.-.- On the last date of hearing petitioner’s counsel was put on notice as to the maintainability of the petition on the count that the challenge involves policy matters as framed by the Federation. The petitioner since put on notice as to questions to be resolved before the merits could be seen, counsel for the petitioner was supposed to address on those points today but he has failed to appear and is called absent. There is no intimation either. The petition as such is dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending applications. Chief Justice Judge
